title: Revert to Version 58

requirements.text: Restore the application to the state of Version 58, undoing all changes introduced in Version 59 across both backend and frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: The deployed application matches the functionality and code of Version 58.
All changes introduced in Version 59 are fully removed.
The backend Motoko actor state and logic reflect Version 58.
The frontend UI and behavior reflect Version 58.

constraints: Do not introduce any new features or changes beyond what is needed to restore Version 58.
Preserve the Version 58 state exactly as it was — no partial rollbacks.
nonGoals: Introducing new features or bug fixes not present in Version 58.
Modifying Version 59 incrementally instead of performing a full revert.
